scaffold.topic: Strategic approach to non-boss combat for this character
scaffold.scope: Generalizable principles applying to MOST hallway and elite encounters, regardless of the specific enemy.
dimensions_to_consider: How to allocate energy each turn (offense / defense / setup)
How to read enemy intents and react to multi-enemy boards
HP loss across the run — when is taking damage acceptable, when should it be avoided, and how does this scale across the act
Card sequencing within a turn (which card types resolve first)
When to spend potions in non-boss combat
out_of_scope: Per-enemy mechanics (round triggers, threshold patterns) -> belongs in combat_guides
Per-card play recipes or specific combos -> belongs in card_memory notes
Specific numerical thresholds tied to one situation

format_constraints.structure: 5-8 numbered principles. Each = one imperative declarative sentence + one short concrete example demonstrating application.

content: TBD - filled by Mode B postrun
